title: KeepItHealthy
body: # ![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf99e23db5497a216d0beb3144afde959d65c004_0.webp) Description **Keep It Healthy** is a Minecraft mod designed to bring a realistic survival experience to the game. It introduces a variety of mechanics that challenge players to manage their health carefully. Survival is no longer just about hunger—your body is now part of the equation. --- ## ![CogWheel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4585c979a9afd10a0be152ebd5c58bc6d4a34bef_0.webp) Features ### ![WoundsIcon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3b6204317d4e35012529aa4e3648f2b3f90665e.png) **Wounds & Infected Wounds** - Sustain injuries from combat or accidents. - Untreated wounds can become infected, reducing your health regeneration and mobility. ### ![BrokenBonesIcon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df26b820feaa8d685340b9bdbcad2bed3aa9e431.png) **Broken Bones** - Fall from great heights or take high-impact damage and risk breaking bones. - Movement becomes slow and painful, requiring small movements or leg cast to heal. ### ![FatigueIcon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2072e1349b5bf6f8f6cb5a337d6928add306b2c5.png) **Fatigue & Sanity** - Pushing yourself too hard without rest will lead to fatigue, affecting your speed and decision-making. - Prolonged isolation or exposure to danger impacts your sanity, with visual and auditory hallucinations. ### ![ColdIcon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c489aec5412a88f70f07147d1756bc884b20aa52.png) **Cold & Salmonella** - Stay warm to avoid catching a cold; exposure to wet and cold environments increases your risk. - Beware of eating raw or spoiled food, as it may cause salmonella, leading to nausea and weakness. ### ![BandageIcon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2d987cd5df6b469e26f8e8ea0a7bec31beddfa9_0.webp) **Bandages, Morphine, and Disinfectant** - Use bandages to stop bleeding, disinfectant to clean wounds, and morphine to alleviate severe pain. ### ![InternalDamage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b7b90519621be86d1ca3a180a4793f92f2f9ed5.png) **Internal Damage** - High-impact events can cause internal injuries, which slowly drain health and require proper care to recover. ### ![HeartIcon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e51e1dca579685fd29f45ea7792f23db9de4fef_0.webp) **Revive Mechanic** - Players can cling to life when their health falls below 3 points. Revive teammates to keep the adventure going. ### ![LowTempIcon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46d5d5b78205819c7230313066bfb5d1a02befec.png) **Simple Temperature System** - Stay mindful of your environment—extreme heat or cold will affect your body temperature and survival chances. --- ## ![Info And Terms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf99e23db5497a216d0beb3144afde959d65c004_0.webp) Info And Terms of Usage You may include this mod in a CurseForge-hosted And Or Modrinth-hosted modpack as long as you do not rehost the mod and only use builds uploaded directly by us, you do not sell the modpack or additional access to the mod via any means, and you follow any and all terms listed in the license for the version of the mod you are using.
